worldattribute-rustfallWorld-desc: Automatically sets up the Rustfall story world: pure ocean, all six story locations pinned at their planned coordinates, and the starter island generated at spawn before you ever land, so you start standing on it. Story areas pregenerate in the background with chat progress. Uses the worldplan.txt plan file from the LandmassGenerator folder.
worldattribute-rustfallNaturalIslands-de: Allow vanilla underwater terrain to occasionally break the surface as small natural islands, adding seabed variety and reasons to explore beyond the planned map. Unchecked, the sea floor is flattened and the only land in the world is the story locations and hand-built islands. Either way, the 500 blocks around spawn stay open ocean.
